mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_item ( item_id, order_id, user_id, product_id, product_name, price, quantity, total_amount, discount_amount, real_pay_amount, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{orderItem.itemId}, #{orderItem.orderId}, #{orderItem.userId}, #{orderItem.productId}, #{orderItem.productName}, #{orderItem.price}, #{orderItem.quantity}, #{orderItem.totalAmount}, #{orderItem.discountAmount}, #{orderItem.realPayAmount}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select item_id,order_id,user_id,product_id,product_name,price,quantity,total_amount,discount_amount,real_pay_amount, create_time,update_time from t_order_item where order_id = #{orderId}
select * from t_order_item where order_id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId}
